hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && { ruff format --quiet "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; ruff check --fix --quiet "$FILE" 2>&1; } || true; fi

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '(rm -rf /|rm -rf \.|drop table|truncate table|git push.*--force.*main|git reset --hard|git clean -fd)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive command. Check AGENTS.md.' >&2; exit 2; fi
